query:
INSERT INTO automation_policies (
  tenant_id,
  policy_name,
  description,
  is_active,
  auto_approve_confidence_threshold,
  auto_approve_max_value,
  manual_review_confidence_threshold,
  manual_review_max_value,
  fraud_sensitivity_multiplier,
  version,
  effective_from,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM insurer_tenants LIMIT 1),
  'Balanced Policy',
  'Balanced risk profile for testing',
  1,
  85,
  7500000,
  65,
  20000000,
  1.0,
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
